name: DocGo Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Company DocGo is leading the proactive healthcare revolution. We are democratizing access with our innovative care delivery platform that includes mobile health services, virtual care management and ambulance services. Our goal is to deliver healthcare at any address and help reshape the traditional healthcare system, driven by our mission to bring high quality, highly accessible care to all. DocGos proprietary technology platform, dedicated network of certified health professionals...
